title: rachats #7364
definition:
1) to wash, wash off, wash away, bathe
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to wash, wash off, wash away
        1a2) to wash, bathe (oneself)
    1b) (Pual) to be washed
    1c) (Hithpael) to wash oneself
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to wash, wash off, wash away
        1a2) to wash, bathe (oneself)
    1b) (Pual) to be washed
    1c) (Hithpael) to wash oneself

    NASB:  to wash, wash off or away, bathe
